parameters.jsCode:
const data = $input.first()?.json ?? {};

return [
  {
    json: {
      ok: true,
      source: 'n8n-local',
      workflow: 'hermes-daily-briefing',
      skipped: Boolean(data.skipped),
      reason: data.skip_reason ?? null,
      duplicate: Boolean(data.duplicate),
      fingerprint: data.fingerprint ?? null,
      summary: data.summary ?? null,
      bucket_counts: data.bucket_counts ?? { total: 0, hot: 0, insight: 0, monitor: 0 },
      briefing_markdown: data.skipped ? null : (data.briefing_markdown ?? null),
      generated_at: data.generated_at ?? new Date().toISOString(),
      collected_at: data.collected_at ?? null,
      priority_tier: data.priority_tier ?? null,
      cadence: data.cadence ?? null,
      schedule_slot: data.schedule_slot ?? null,
      source_plan: data.source_plan ?? null,
      security_stats: data.security_stats ?? null,
      orchestration: data.orchestration ?? null,
    },
  },
];

nodes.name: Prepare P0 Config
nodes.notes: Inject tier-specific config for shared Hermes collector.
